locations.clue: Built by Emperor Shah Jahan as a mausoleum for his wife, this white marble monument is India's most iconic landmark — find it.
Japan's highest peak and most sacred mountain is a near-perfect symmetrical volcano visible from Tokyo — where is it?
The world's largest religious monument was built in the 12th century in the Khmer Empire — where does it stand?
Modeled on the Eiffel Tower but painted red and white for aviation safety, this 333-m structure defines the Tokyo skyline — find it.
Singapore's national symbol is a mythical creature with a lion's head and a fish's body — where does it spray water?
Stretching over 21,000 km, this ancient series of fortifications was built to protect China's northern border — find it.
Which Japanese city was the target of the world's first nuclear bomb attack on August 6, 1945?
Which Himalayan peak, the world's highest, straddles the Nepal-Tibet border?
Which orchid-shaped Indonesian island is home to the world's oldest known cave paintings?
The longest river in Asia and third-longest in the world flows through the Three Gorges before reaching the East China Sea — find it.
At 8,849 m, this is the highest point on Earth, straddling the border of Nepal and Tibet — where is its summit?
The world's second-highest mountain and considered more technically challenging than Everest sits on the Pakistan-China border — find it.
The largest desert in Asia stretches across northern China and southern Mongolia — where is it?
This 98-m golden pagoda in Myanmar's largest city is said to contain relics of four Buddhas — find it.
China's capital, home to the Forbidden City and Tiananmen Square, sits in northeastern China — where is it?
The tenth-longest river in the world flows through six countries from the Tibetan Plateau to the South China Sea — trace it.
The world's largest bay is bounded by India, Bangladesh, Myanmar, and the Andaman Islands — find it.
Find the exact spot of the Taj Mahal's central dome in Agra, India.
The world's most populous country occupies most of the Indian subcontinent in South Asia — find it.
The Taj Mahal stands on the banks of the Yamuna River in which Indian city?
Drop a pin on the summit crater of Japan's most sacred volcano.
This archipelago of nearly 7,000 islands off the coast of East Asia is the world's third-largest economy — find it.
Mount Fuji stands between which two Japanese prefectures, visible on clear days from Tokyo?
Find the central tower of Angkor Wat temple in northern Cambodia.
Which Southeast Asian country is home to the ancient Khmer empire and Angkor Wat?
The Angkor Wat temple complex is near which Cambodian city that grew up to serve the ancient Khmer capital?
Find Tokyo Tower, the red-and-white landmark rising above the Minato neighborhood.
Tokyo Tower stands in the Minato district of which world city famous for its neon and tech culture?
Find the Merlion statue at the mouth of the Singapore River near Marina Bay.
The world's second-most densely populated country is a city-state at the southern tip of the Malay Peninsula — find it.
The Merlion watches over which city-state at the southern tip of the Malay Peninsula?
Find the most-photographed section of the Great Wall at Jinshanling.
The most populous country in the world until 2023, it covers most of East Asia — pinpoint it.
The Great Wall's most-visited sections are closest to which Chinese capital city?
Find the Hiroshima Peace Memorial, the only structure left standing near the atomic bomb hypocenter in 1945.
The first atomic bomb was dropped on August 6, 1945 — on which Japanese city?
Find the summit of Mount Everest, first reached by Hillary and Norgay on May 29, 1953.
Which landlocked Himalayan country is home to eight of the world's ten highest mountains?
Everest sits on the border between Nepal and which Chinese-administered region?
Find the Leang Tedongnge cave in Sulawesi, Indonesia, where the world's oldest known figurative cave art was discovered.
The world's largest archipelago nation, stretching 5,000 km across Southeast Asia — find it.
The oldest known cave paintings are on the island of Sulawesi — in which Southeast Asian country?
Find the Three Gorges section of the Yangtze River, the most dramatic stretch of Asia's longest river.
The Yangtze River flows into the East China Sea near which major Chinese port city?
Drop a pin as close as possible to the summit of the world's highest mountain.
Mount Everest sits on the border of Nepal and which other country?
Find the base camp on the Pakistani side of K2, the world's second-highest mountain.
Which South Asian country is home to K2, the Indus Valley civilization, and the Karakoram Highway?
K2 sits in the Karakoram range on the border of Pakistan and which neighboring country?
Drop a pin in the heart of the Gobi, the largest cold-winter desert in the world.
This landlocked country between China and Russia is the world's most sparsely populated sovereign state — find it.
The Gobi Desert spans across portions of China and which landlocked country to the north?
Find the Shwedagon Pagoda's central stupa, the most sacred Buddhist site in Myanmar.
Which Southeast Asian country, bordered by India, China, and Thailand, is home to the Shwedagon Pagoda?
The Shwedagon Pagoda dominates the skyline of Yangon — the largest city of which Southeast Asian country?
This ancient rock fortress in Sri Lanka rises 200 m above the surrounding jungle and once housed a 5th-century palace — find it.
The world's third-largest island, shared by Malaysia, Indonesia, and Brunei, is one of the last homes of wild orangutans — find it.
This vast imperial palace complex, home to 24 Chinese emperors of the Ming and Qing dynasties, sits at the heart of Beijing — find it.
This vast sand desert covers 70% of Turkmenistan and is home to the famous 'Door to Hell' burning crater — find it.
Known as the 'White Heron Castle' for its brilliant white exterior, this is Japan's most visited castle — where is it?
Once the winter residence of the Dalai Lama, this 13-story palace rises above Lhasa, Tibet — find it.
Over 2,000 ancient Buddhist temples and pagodas spread across this Myanmar plain — where is this archaeological treasure?
The futuristic capital of Kazakhstan, renamed from Nur-Sultan in 2022 — where is this steppe city?
The Petronas Twin Towers once dominated the skyline of which Southeast Asian capital?
The capital of Nepal sits in a Himalayan valley and is the gateway to Everest expeditions — find it.
Formerly called Saigon, this southern Vietnamese city is the country's largest and economic hub — find it.
Shaped like an unfolding lotus flower, this Bahai House of Worship in New Delhi is one of the most visited buildings in the world — find it.
Named after the Hindu god of dawn, this riverside temple with its distinctive spire defines the Bangkok skyline — find it.
This 9th-century Hindu temple compound in Java, dedicated to the Trimurti, is a UNESCO World Heritage Site — where is it?
Thousands of vermilion torii gates form a winding mountain trail at this Shinto shrine south of Kyoto — find it.
Chinese emperors offered prayers for good harvests at this circular ceremonial hall in southern Beijing — find it.
The world's largest Buddhist temple, built in the 9th century, rises from a hilltop in central Java — where is it?
The most sacred site in Tibetan Buddhism sits in the heart of the old Barkhor district of Lhasa — find it.
The Taj Mahal was built in which riverside city in the Indian state of Uttar Pradesh?
Mount Fuji is visible from Tokyo on clear days — in which direction from the capital does it rise?
Angkor Wat is near which Cambodian city north of the Tonle Sap lake?
The Merlion stands at the waterfront in which district of Singapore?
The Great Wall's Jinshanling section lies how far northeast of Beijing?
Where does the Yangtze River meet the East China Sea near Shanghai?
K2 sits in which remote mountain range on Pakistan's border with China?
The Gobi Desert covers the south of which East Asian country?
In which Myanmar city does the golden Shwedagon Pagoda stand?
Where does the Mekong River empty into the South China Sea through its vast delta in Vietnam?
Which eastern Indian city sits on the Bay of Bengal's coast?
Pinpoint the Taj Mahal's city of Agra on the banks of the Yamuna River.
Find the summit of Mount Fuji on the border of Shizuoka and Yamanashi prefectures.
Find Angkor Wat temple in the Siem Reap province of Cambodia.
Find Merlion Park at the mouth of the Singapore River.
Find the Badaling section of the Great Wall closest to Beijing.
locations.answer: Regional Focus: Great Wall of China

locations.clue: Find the summit ridge of Mount Everest on the Nepal-Tibet border.
locations.answer: Explorer Spot: Which mountain did Edmund Hillary and Tenzing Norgay first summit in 1953

locations.clue: Everest Base Camp on the Nepalese side is the starting point of nearly all summit attempts — find it.
locations.answer: Regional Focus: Which mountain did Edmund Hillary and Tenzing Norgay first summit in 1953

locations.clue: Find the Leang Tedongnge cave on the Indonesian island of Sulawesi.
locations.answer: Explorer Spot: Where is the oldest known cave painting located (over 45,000 years old)

locations.clue: The world's oldest known cave painting is on which Indonesian island?
locations.answer: Regional Focus: Where is the oldest known cave painting located (over 45,000 years old)

locations.clue: Find K2 base camp in the Baltoro Glacier region of Pakistan's Karakoram.
K2 sits in the Gilgit-Baltistan region of which South Asian country?
Drop a pin in the Khongoryn Els sand dunes in the heart of the Mongolian Gobi.
The Gobi Desert covers the southern quarter of which country north of China?
The Shwedagon Pagoda's golden dome towers above Yangon — in which Southeast Asian country?
This ancient rock fortress known as 'Lion Rock' rises from the jungles of which island nation off India's southeast coast?
The Indonesian portion of Borneo, called Kalimantan, covers most of which third-largest island in the world?
The Karakum covers most of which Central Asian country that was once part of the Soviet Union?
Wat Arun, the Temple of Dawn, stands on the western bank of the Chao Phraya River in which city?
The capital of Thailand, with the world's longest official city name, sits on the Chao Phraya River — find it.
Japan's capital, the world's most populous metropolitan area, sits on the eastern Honshu coast — find it.
The world's third-largest ocean is bounded by Africa, Asia, and Australia — drop a pin in it.
This vast imperial palace complex, home to 24 Chinese emperors of the Ming and Qing dynasties, sits at the heart of Beijing — find it.
Find the Juyong Pass checkpoint of the Great Wall, the most fortified section near Beijing.
Chinese emperors offered prayers for good harvests at this circular ceremonial hall in southern Beijing — find it.
Over 2,000 Buddhist pagodas dot this ancient plain along the Ayeyarwady River in Myanmar — find them.
The world's largest Buddhist temple, built in the 9th century, rises from a hilltop in central Java — where is it?
Victoria Peak overlooks which former British colony and now Special Administrative Region of China?
The world's highest mountain range formed when India collided with Asia and stretches across five countries — find it.
Hinduism's holiest river flows from the Himalayas across the north Indian plain to the Bay of Bengal — trace it.
This vast river delta in Vietnam, where the Mekong fans into many branches before meeting the sea, is known as the 'rice bowl' — find it.
The Great Indian Desert stretches across northwestern India and Pakistan and is one of the most densely populated deserts — find it.
The world's most populous island is home to Jakarta, Borobudur, and over 140 million people — where is it?
The sixth-largest island in the world sits west of the Malay Peninsula and is home to the only wild Sumatran tigers — find it.
The world's third-largest island, shared by Malaysia, Indonesia, and Brunei, is one of the last homes of wild orangutans — find it.
The towering sandstone pillars in this Chinese national park inspired the floating mountains in the film Avatar — where are they?
These rainbow-striped Painted Mountains in Gansu Province, China were formed by layers of colorful sandstone — find them.
Shaped as the chariot of the sun god, this 13th-century temple on India's eastern coast is a UNESCO site — find it.
Hindu shrines and temples fill these limestone caves just north of Kuala Lumpur, guarded by a giant gold deity — find them.
Tanah Lot temple sits on a rock in the sea off which Indonesian island famous for its rice terraces and surf?
Kinkaku-ji, the Golden Pavilion, sits in which Japanese city that was the imperial capital for over 1,000 years?
Thailand's second-largest city sits in the mountainous north near the Golden Triangle borders with Myanmar and Laos — find it.
Hoan Kiem Lake sits in the heart of the capital of which Southeast Asian country?
The Marble Mountains are five limestone peaks near which central Vietnamese coastal city?
Vietnam's highest peak, Fansipan, rises in the mountains near which terraced-rice-paddy town?
This UNESCO World Heritage city at the confluence of the Mekong and Nam Khan rivers is the cultural capital of which country?
The ancient Khmer capital of Angkor sits near which Cambodian provincial city?
Which Cambodian city is the gateway to Angkor Wat, the world's largest religious monument?
Myanmar's largest city and former capital, home to the golden Shwedagon Pagoda — find it.
Myanmar's second-largest city sits on the Irrawaddy River and houses the last royal palace of the Konbaung dynasty — find it.
The 'Pink City' of Rajasthan is famous for the Hawa Mahal's honeycomb facade — which Indian city is it?
Which holy city on the banks of the Ganges is considered one of the oldest continuously inhabited cities on Earth?
The Taj Mahal stands in which Indian city once capital of the Mughal Empire, on the banks of the Yamuna?
The holiest shrine of Sikhism, covered in gold leaf, sits in which Indian city near the Pakistan border?
The world's second-largest alpine lake sits in the Tian Shan mountains of Kyrgyzstan — where is it?
The largest desert in China, its name means 'you go in, you don't come out' in Uyghur — find it.
The Gobi Desert spans across northern and northwestern China and southern Mongolia — drop a pin in it.
This island nation in the Indian Ocean is the world's lowest-lying country and most threatened by rising sea levels — where is it?
This body of water between the Andaman and Nicobar Islands and the Malay Peninsula — where is it?
This 6-million sq km sea area between the Philippines, Malaysia, and Indonesia contains 76% of all coral species — find it.
This cold northern Pacific sea separates Alaska from Siberia and is one of the world's richest fishing grounds — where is it?
India's capital city, home to the Red Fort, India Gate, and Lotus Temple — find it.
The sprawling capital of Indonesia on the island of Java, being replaced by the new capital Nusantara — find it.
Myanmar's purpose-built capital was moved here from Yangon in 2006 — where is this rarely-visited city?
The capital of Cambodia sits at the confluence of the Mekong and Tonle Sap rivers — where is it?
The world's coldest capital city, home to nearly half of Mongolia's population, sits on the Tuul River — find it.
Pakistan's planned capital city sits in the foothills of the Margalla Hills — where is it?
The commercial capital of Sri Lanka on the Indian Ocean coast — find it.
The capital of Kyrgyzstan sits in the Chuy Valley near the border with Kazakhstan — where is it?
The capital of Laos is one of the smallest and least-visited capitals in Southeast Asia, sitting on the Mekong — find it.
The capital of the Maldives is one of the most densely populated cities in the world, built on a coral island — find it.
The capital of Turkmenistan is famous for its white marble buildings and holds multiple Guinness World Records — find it.
China's most populous city and financial capital sits at the mouth of the Yangtze River — find it.
Japan's second city, known for its street food and comedy culture, sits on the eastern shore of Osaka Bay — find it.
India's financial capital and home of Bollywood sits on a peninsula on the western coast — find it.
The capital of South Korea, one of the world's most technologically advanced cities, sits on the Han River — find it.
The capital of Taiwan sits in the northern part of the island and is home to the Taipei 101 skyscraper — find it.
One of the world's most densely populated cities is the capital of which South Asian country at the head of the Bay of Bengal?
The capital of Afghanistan, set in a narrow valley between the Hindu Kush mountains, has been inhabited for 3,500 years — find it.
Pakistan's largest city and main seaport on the Arabian Sea was the country's first capital — find it.
Thailand's largest island is connected to the mainland by a bridge and is famous for its beaches — where is it?
At 3,650 m above sea level, the 'Roof of the World' city is the historic capital of Tibet — find it.
China's 'Mother River' and second-longest river flows through the North China Plain to the Yellow Sea — trace it.
The secretive capital of North Korea sits on the Taedong River and is home to 3 million people — find it.
